label: CEFR B1-B2
description: Từ vựng tiếng Anh trung cấp theo chuẩn CEFR B1-B2

words.example: I use my computer to write reports for work every day.
words.hint: An electronic device for processing data

words.example: The internet has changed the way people communicate around the world.
words.hint: A global network connecting millions of computers

words.example: Most people check their smartphone as soon as they wake up.
words.hint: A mobile phone with advanced features

words.example: The company developed new software to manage customer accounts.
words.hint: Programs and applications that run on a computer

words.example: You can find more information about the course on our website.
words.hint: A collection of pages on the internet

words.example: It took several minutes to download the large video file.
words.hint: To transfer data from the internet to your device

words.example: You should change your password regularly to keep your account safe.
words.hint: A secret word or phrase used to access something

words.example: She sent an email to her manager to request a day off.
words.hint: Electronic messages sent over the internet

words.example: He was taken to the hospital after the accident.
words.hint: A place where sick or injured people receive medical care

words.example: The doctor prescribed some medicine for her cough.
words.hint: A substance used to treat illness

words.example: The child had a high fever and needed to stay in bed.
words.hint: An abnormally high body temperature

words.example: I have a terrible headache, so I need to lie down for a while.
words.hint: A pain in the head

words.example: You should visit the dentist at least twice a year for a check-up.
words.hint: A doctor who takes care of teeth

words.example: A sore throat is a common symptom of the flu.
words.hint: A sign that indicates a disease or condition

words.example: The treatment for this condition usually takes about six weeks.
words.hint: Medical care given to a patient for an illness

words.example: I went to the pharmacy to buy some cough syrup.
words.hint: A store where medicines are sold

words.example: Make sure your passport is valid before you book your flight.
words.hint: An official document for international travel

words.example: Passengers are allowed to bring one piece of carry-on luggage.
words.hint: Bags and suitcases you take when traveling

words.example: We made a reservation at the restaurant for Friday evening.
words.hint: An arrangement to have something kept for you

words.example: Paris is one of the most popular tourist destinations in the world.
words.hint: The place where someone is going

words.example: The city attracts millions of tourists every summer.
words.hint: A person who visits places for pleasure

words.example: Our flight to London departs at seven in the morning.
words.hint: A journey by airplane

words.example: We stayed at a lovely hotel near the beach during our vacation.
words.hint: A building where travelers pay to stay overnight

words.example: She bought a small souvenir from each country she visited.
words.hint: An object kept as a reminder of a place or event

words.example: Air pollution in big cities is a serious problem for public health.
words.hint: Harmful substances released into the environment

words.example: We should recycle plastic bottles instead of throwing them away.
words.hint: To process waste materials so they can be used again

words.example: Climate change is affecting weather patterns all over the world.
words.hint: The general weather conditions of a region over time

words.example: The giant panda is an endangered species that needs protection.
words.hint: At risk of becoming extinct

words.example: Conservation efforts have helped increase the tiger population.
words.hint: The protection of natural resources and wildlife

words.example: Solar and wind power are examples of renewable energy sources.
words.hint: A resource that can be naturally replaced over time

words.example: Coral reefs are delicate ecosystems that support many forms of life.
words.hint: A community of living things and their environment

words.example: The national park is home to a wide variety of wildlife.
words.hint: Animals and plants living in their natural habitat

words.example: The news channel will broadcast the event live at eight o'clock.
words.hint: To send out a program on television or radio

words.example: The shocking headline caught everyone's attention this morning.
words.hint: The title at the top of a news story

words.example: The journalist traveled to the region to report on the crisis.
words.hint: A person who writes or reports news

words.example: I saw an advertisement for the new restaurant on social media.
words.hint: A public notice promoting a product or service

words.meaning: chương trình phát thanh trực tuyến
words.example: I listen to a language learning podcast on my way to work.
words.hint: An audio program available for download online

words.example: The actor gave an interview about his upcoming movie.
words.hint: A conversation where one person asks questions to another

words.example: The audience applauded loudly at the end of the performance.
words.hint: A group of people watching or listening to something

words.example: She wrote an interesting article about the effects of social media.
words.hint: A piece of writing published in a newspaper or online
